title: Shared Type Definitions
description: Reusable type definitions referenced by every other schema in this directory via $ref.

ulid.description: Crockford Base32 ULID (26 chars). Used for every id field across the system.

iso8601Timestamp.description: ISO-8601 datetime with timezone. Naive timestamps are rejected.

sha256Prefixed.description: SHA-256 with explicit algorithm prefix. Used for hashes that travel through tool boundaries.

jurisdictionCode.description: ISO-3166-2-style jurisdiction code. Federal: 'US'. State: 'US-CA'. Sub-jurisdiction: 'US-CA:los-angeles-county'. Pre-validated by R2.

docId.description: Typed document identifier of form <source_category>:<jurisdiction>:<identifier>. Examples: 'primary_statute:us-ca:ca-lab-2775', 'case_law:us-ca:dynamex-operations-w-v-superior-court-2018', 'primary_regulation:us:29-cfr-541-100'.

spanAnchor.description: R4 anchor pointing to a span retrieved this session. char_end must be > char_start (enforced at runtime, not schema).

confidenceLevel.description: Per-criterion or aggregate confidence rating from the Confidence sub-agent.

severityLevel.description: Severity for a flagged risk-taxonomy category (R12).

sourceProfileId.description: Active source profile. B is the default (Lexis-free); A is opt-in (Lexis-enabled).

deliveryChannel.description: Channel adapters available via OpenClaw. 'web' is reserved for the Phase 7 web chat surface.
